name: oh-my-opencode - npm
snippet: The published npm package and CLI binary are still named oh-my-opencode (dual-published as oh-my-openagent during the rename transition). Inside opencode.json, the compatibility layer prefers the plugin entry oh-my-openagent, while legacy oh-my-opencode entries still load with a warning.
